chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P Nos. D- 5642 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ (Priority). 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 24432/18. 3. For hearing of main case. -------------- 08.10.2024. Ms. Dil Khurram Shaheen, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- Counsel, under instructions, wants to withdraw the instant petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as withdrawn with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
